title: Lead Instructional Designer at Delhi University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Delhi University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
